CREATE TABLE blobs (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data BLOB);
SELECT id, octet_length(data) FROM blobs WHERE octet_length(data) > 0;
SELECT id, octet_length(data) AS length FROM blobs WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM blobs WHERE length > 2);
SELECT AVG(octet_length(data)) FROM blobs WHERE octet_length(data) < 10;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blobs WHERE octet_length(data) = (SELECT MAX(octet_length(data)) FROM blobs);
WITH blob_lengths AS (SELECT id, octet_length(data) AS length FROM blobs) SELECT id FROM blob_lengths WHERE length > (SELECT AVG(length) FROM blob_lengths);
SELECT id, octet_length(data) FROM blobs ORDER BY octet_length(data) DESC;
SELECT b.id, b.data, octet_length(b.data) FROM blobs b JOIN blobs b2 ON b.id != b2.id WHERE octet_length(b.data) = octet_length(b2.data);
